name: codex-telegram-gateway
description: Sync Codex App threads to Telegram forum topics with a plugin-local MCP gateway.

interface.shortDescription: Map Codex App threads to Telegram topics.
interface.longDescription: Installs a Telegram gateway into Codex App. The plugin provides MCP tools and a companion skill that operate in app context to inspect loaded projects and threads, bind Telegram forum topics, and sync Telegram messages with persisted Codex thread mappings.
defaultPrompt: Show the loaded Codex App projects and threads for the Telegram gateway.
Link the current Codex App thread to Telegram.
Sync Telegram with the currently bound Codex App threads.
